isolation.sharedState: none — each test creates its own MockPiChannel

assertions.title: thread/start maps to Pi prompt with text extraction

steps.expected: send_request('thread/start', {items: [{role:'user',content:'Hello Pi!'}]}) extracts text, sends prompt command, returns synthetic ThreadStart with thread ID
steps.observed: Test passed. Result contains 'id' and 'thread_id' string fields with 'pi-thread-' prefix. Mock captured prompt command with text='Hello Pi!'

steps.expected: send_request('thread/start', {content: 'Direct content text'}) extracts text from content field
steps.observed: Test passed. Mock captured prompt command with text='Direct content text'

steps.expected: send_request('thread/start', {text: 'Text field content'}) extracts text from text field
steps.observed: Test passed. Mock captured prompt command with text='Text field content'

steps.expected: send_request('turn/start', {items: [{role:'user',content:'Follow-up question'}]}) extracts text and sends prompt command
steps.observed: Test passed. Result contains 'id' string field. Mock captured prompt command with text='Follow-up question'. Same mapping as thread/start since Pi doesn't distinguish thread/turn.

steps.expected: send_request('turn/interrupt', null) calls abort() and returns Ok(Value::Null)
steps.observed: Test passed. Result is null. Mock captured abort command with type='abort'

steps.expected: send_request('turn/interrupt', null) succeeds even when no prompt is active (idle state)
steps.observed: Test passed. Result is Ok — abort on idle succeeds as no-op
Test passed. Response has 'threads' array field with length 0, compatible with Codex ThreadList format

steps.expected: send_request('thread/read', {thread_id: 'some-thread'}) calls get_state() and returns result
steps.observed: Test passed. Mock queued get_state response {status:'idle', session_id:'sess-1'}. Transport returned matching result. Mock captured get_state command.

assertions.title: thread/archive, rollback, name/set return success no-op

steps.expected: send_request('thread/archive', {thread_id:'t1'}) returns {ok:true} without sending Pi command
steps.observed: Test passed. Response is {ok:true}. No commands sent to Pi (captured commands list is empty).

steps.expected: send_request('thread/rollback', {thread_id:'t1'}) returns {ok:true} without sending Pi command
steps.observed: Test passed. Response is {ok:true}. No commands sent to Pi.

steps.expected: send_request('thread/name/set', {thread_id:'t1',name:'New Name'}) returns {ok:true} without sending Pi command
steps.observed: Test passed. Response is {ok:true}. No commands sent to Pi.
Test passed. Response is exactly {data:[]}. No commands sent to Pi.

steps.expected: send_request('some/future/method', null) returns RpcError::Server with code -32601
steps.observed: Test passed. Result is Err(RpcError::Server { code: -32601, message }) where message contains 'some/future/method'.

lifecycleTest.description: Verifies complete Pi event lifecycle from agent_start through agent_end, including thinking deltas, text deltas, tool execution with stdout, and all ProviderEvent mappings (StreamingStarted, TurnStarted, ReasoningDelta, MessageDelta, ToolCallStarted, CommandOutputDelta, StreamingCompleted, etc.)

summary: Tested 8 assertions (VAL-PI-MAP-001 through VAL-PI-MAP-008): all 8 passed. 14 individual unit tests plus 1 full lifecycle test all passed with no failures. Text extraction works from items array, content field, and text field. Abort is correctly dispatched and succeeds on idle. No-op methods return {ok:true} without sending Pi commands. Unknown methods correctly return -32601 error.
